mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FAVORITE_ANIMAL WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}) AS favoriteCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ADOPTION WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}) AS adoptionCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}) AS postCount FROM DUAL

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, T.* FROM ( SELECT A.ANIMAL_ID AS animalId, A.ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, A.ANIMAL_TYPE AS animalType, A.BREED AS breed, A.GENDER AS gender, A.AGE AS age, A.WEIGHT AS weight, A.ADOPTION_STATUS AS adoptionStatus, A.PERSONALITY AS personality, A.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, A.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, I.SAVE_FILE_NAME AS mainImage, 1 AS isFavorite FROM FAVORITE_ANIMAL F JOIN ANIMAL A ON F.ANIMAL_ID = A.ANIMAL_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ANIMAL_IMAGE I ON A.ANIMAL_ID = I.ANIMAL_ID AND (I.IS_MAIN = 'Y' OR I.IS_MAIN IS NULL) WHERE F.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY F.CREATE_DATE DESC ) T ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "totalCount", NVL(SUM(DONATION_AMOUNT), 0) AS "totalAmount" FROM DONATION WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, T.* FROM ( SELECT DONATION_ID AS donationId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, DONATION_AMOUNT AS donationAmount, TO_CHAR(DONATION_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS donationDateStr, DONATION_METHOD AS donationMethod, PAYMENT_TYPE AS donationType, RECEIPT_YN AS receiptYn FROM DONATION WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY DONATION_DATE DESC, DONATION_ID DESC ) T ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VOLUNTEER_APPLY WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM APPLY_DATE) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, T.* FROM ( SELECT VA.VOLUNTEER_ID AS volunteerId, VA.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, VA.RECRUIT_ID AS recruitId, VA.INTEREST_TYPE AS interestType, VA.STATUS AS status, VA.APPLY_REASON AS applyReason, VA.APPLY_DATE AS applyDate, VA.VOLUNTEER_DATE AS volunteerDate, VA.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, VR.TITLE AS title, VR.LOCATION AS location, TO_CHAR(VA.APPLY_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS applyDateStr FROM VOLUNTEER_APPLY VA JOIN VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT VR ON VA.RECRUIT_ID = VR.RECRUIT_ID WHERE VA.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY VA.APPLY_DATE DESC ) T ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT TO_CHAR(VA.VOLUNTEER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "dateStr", VR.TITLE AS "title", CASE WHEN VA.STATUS = '승인' AND VA.VOLUNTEER_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "isCompleted" FROM VOLUNTEER_APPLY VA JOIN VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT VR ON VA.RECRUIT_ID = VR.RECRUIT_ID WHERE VA.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM VA.VOLUNTEER_DATE) = #{year} AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM VA.VOLUNTEER_DATE) = #{month} AND VA.STATUS IN ('승인', '대기')
mapper.sql: SELECT 'favorite' AS icon, 'pink' AS iconType, 'pink' AS badgeType, '관심등록' AS badgeLabel, '''' || A.ANIMAL_NAME || ''' 을(를) 관심 목록에 추가했습니다.' AS description, TO_CHAR(F.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS actDate FROM FAVORITE_ANIMAL F JOIN ANIMAL A ON F.ANIMAL_ID = A.ANIMAL_ID WHERE F.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

SELECT 'content_paste' AS icon, 'blue' AS iconType, CASE AD.STATUS WHEN '승인' THEN 'green' WHEN '반려' THEN 'red' ELSE 'blue' END AS badgeType, AD.STATUS AS badgeLabel, '''' || A.ANIMAL_NAME || ''' 입양 신청서를 제출했습니다.' AS description, TO_CHAR(AD.APPLY_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS actDate FROM ADOPTION AD JOIN ANIMAL A ON AD.ANIMAL_ID = A.ANIMAL_ID WHERE AD.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

SELECT 'volunteer_activism' AS icon, 'green' AS iconType, 'green' AS badgeType, '후원완료' AS badgeLabel, TO_CHAR(D.DONATION_AMOUNT, 'FM999,999,999') || '원을 후원했습니다.' AS description, TO_CHAR(D.DONATION_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS actDate FROM DONATION D WHERE D.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

SELECT 'handshake' AS icon, 'orange' AS iconType, CASE VA.STATUS WHEN '승인' THEN 'emerald' WHEN '반려' THEN 'red' ELSE 'emerald' END AS badgeType, CASE VA.STATUS WHEN '승인' THEN '신청완료' WHEN '반려' THEN '취소됨' ELSE '승인대기' END AS badgeLabel, '''' || VR.TITLE || ''' 봉사활동을 신청했습니다.' AS description, TO_CHAR(VA.APPLY_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS actDate FROM VOLUNTEER_APPLY VA JOIN VOLUNTEER_RECRUIT VR ON VA.RECRUIT_ID = VR.RECRUIT_ID WHERE VA.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, T.* FROM (
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM FAVORITE_ANIMAL UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM ADOPTION UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM DONATION UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM VOLUNTEER_APPLY )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FAVORITE_ANIMAL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ADOPTION
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DONATION
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VOLUNTEER_APPLY

UNION ALL
UNION ALL
UNION ALL
ORDER BY actDate DESC
ORDER BY actDate DESC
ORDER BY actDate DESC
ORDER BY actDate DESC
ORDER BY actDate DESC
